title: erysimum hieraciifolium subsp. strictum
intro: Erysimum hieraciifolium subsp. strictum, also known as strict wallflower, is a subspecies of the wallflower plant, which belongs to the family Brassicaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which make it useful for treating various health issues such as wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. The strict wallflower is rich in flavonoids and saponins, which contribute to its health benefits, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and immune-boosting properties. Herbal preparations of the strict wallflower can be found in the form of infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health conditions, from digestive issues to skin conditions and respiratory problems.
